title: Former Plett detective found murdered along Keurbooms Beach in Plett
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The family of a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The family of a former Plettenberg Bay detective has confirmed that the 54-year-old woman was murdered in the early hours of Monday morning.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The family of a former Plettenberg Bay detective has confirmed that the 54-year-old woman was murdered in the early hours of Monday morning."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The body of Anneke ‘Nicky’ van Heerden was discovered near Riverside Park along Keurbooms Beach."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The discovery was made in the early hours of Monday, according to her brother-in-law, Hein Bruwer.","html":"The discovery was made in the early hours of Monday, according to her brother-in-law, Hein Bruwer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bruwer said Van Heerden was previously employed as a detective at the Plettenberg Bay Police Station.","html":"Bruwer said Van Heerden was previously employed as a detective at the Plettenberg Bay Police Station."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added that she had been visiting a friend in Plettenberg Bay whom she had only met about a week earlier.","html":"He added that she had been visiting a friend in Plettenberg Bay whom she had only met about a week earlier."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bruwer said details surrounding her death remained unclear at this stage. A man had reportedly been taken into custody in connection with the incident.","html":"Bruwer said details surrounding her death remained unclear at this stage. A man had reportedly been taken into custody in connection with the incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police has been approached for comment and their response will be published once received.","html":"The police has been approached for comment and their response will be published once received."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a developing story.","html":"This is a developing story."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Former Plett detective found murdered along Keurbooms Beach in Plett
